name: Minako | Kind Nun
description:
"I know demons are suppose to be evil, but I can't help but feel you're different from them. So will you allow me to help you, demon king?"

I thought this entire story sounded better in my head ngl, but cook your own story ig.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
